_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 16:27:32Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user is asking about where a specific CSS rule is generated from in Tailwind CSS v4. They're looking at compiled CSS output in DevTools and see a `@layer base` rule that sets `background`, `color`, and `--root-bg` variables. They want to know which Tailwind CSS v4 configuration or source file generates this.

Let me look at the highlighted section in the screenshot:

```css
@layer base {
  :root, [data-theme] {
    background: var(--page-scroll-bg, var(--root-bg));
    color: var(--color-base-content);
  }
  :where(:root, [data-theme]) {
    --root-bg: var(--color-base-100);
  }
}
```

This looks like it could be from DaisyUI or from the project's Tailwind CSS configuration. I need to check the Tailwind CSS v4 config file to see if this is defined there or if it's coming from a plugin like DaisyUI.
</details></think>

```text
    59→    position: relative;
    60→
    61→    & a {
    62→      line-height: 1.6;

    64→
    65→    @apply min-w-0 flex-1 list-inside justify-between;
    66→
    67→    & > li::before {
    68→      content: '';

    71→      bottom: 0;

    76→      border-left: 0;

    80→      top: 0;
    81→    }

    84→      top: 50%;
    85→    }
    86→

    99→    }
   100→
   101→    & > li::after {
   102→      content: '';
   103→      left: calc(-1rem - 6px);
   104→      top: 50%;
   105→      transform: translateY(-50%);
   106→      height: 8px;
   107→      width: 8px;
   108→      border-radius: 50%;
   109→      position: absolute;

   114→
   115→@layer components {
   116→  .mask-cover {

   134→  }

   136→  @keyframes blink {
   137→    0% {

   140→    40% {
   141→      opacity: 0;

   155→  .hit-the-floor {

   171→      0 20px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
   172→  }
   173→}
   174→
   175→@layer components {
   176→  .page-head-gradient {
   177→    @apply pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-[500px] w-full;
   178→
   179→    overflow: hidden;
   180→    animation: fade-in 0.8s ease 0.2s both;
   181→  }
   182→
   183→  .page-head-gradient::before,
   184→  .page-head-gradient::after {
   185→    content: '';
   186→    position: absolute;
   187→    border-radius: 50%;
   188→    filter: blur(60px);
   189→    animation:
   190→      blob-entrance 2s ease-out 0.5s both,
   191→      blob-float 20s ease-in-out 2.5s infinite;
   192→  }
   193→
   194→  .page-head-gradient::before {
   195→    width: 350px;
   196→    height: 350px;
   197→    background: rgb(var(--gradient-from) / 0.2);
   198→    top: -120px;
   199→    left: 5%;
   200→    animation-delay: 0.5s, 3s;
   201→  }
   202→
   203→  .page-head-gradient::after {
   204→    width: 250px;
   205→    height: 250px;
   206→    background: rgb(var(--gradient-to) / 0.25);
   207→    top: -80px;
   208→    right: 15%;
   209→    animation:
   210→      blob-entrance-alt 2.2s ease-out 1s both,
   211→      blob-float 25s ease-in-out 3.5s infinite;
   212→  }
   213→
   214→  [data-theme='dark'] .page-head-gradient::before {
   215→    background: rgb(var(--gradient-from) / 0.15);
   216→  }
   217→
   218→  [data-theme='dark'] .page-head-gradient::after {
   219→    background: rgb(var(--gradient-to) / 0.18);
   220→  }
   221→
   222→  @keyframes blob-entrance {
   223→    0% {
   224→      opacity: 0;
   225→      transform: translate(-50px, -100px) scale(0.3);
   226→      filter: blur(120px);
   227→    }
   228→    30% {
   229→      opacity: 0.3;
   230→      transform: translate(-20px, -50px) scale(0.6);
   231→      filter: blur(90px);
   232→    }
   233→    70% {
   234→      opacity: 0.8;
   235→      transform: translate(-5px, -10px) scale(0.9);
   236→      filter: blur(70px);
   237→    }
   238→    100% {
   239→      opacity: 1;
   240→      transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1);
   241→      filter: blur(60px);
   242→    }
   243→  }
   244→
   245→  @keyframes blob-entrance-alt {
   246→    0% {
   247→      opacity: 0;
   248→      transform: translate(80px, -120px) scale(0.2) rotate(45deg);
   249→      filter: blur(140px);
   250→    }
   251→    25% {
   252→      opacity: 0.2;
   253→      transform: translate(40px, -80px) scale(0.5) rotate(22deg);
   254→      filter: blur(100px);
   255→    }
   256→    60% {

   258→      transform: translate(15px, -25px) scale(0.85) rotate(8deg);
   259→      filter: blur(75px);
   260→    }
   261→    100% {
   262→      opacity: 1;
   263→      transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1) rotate(0deg);
   264→      filter: blur(60px);
   265→    }
   266→  }
   267→
   268→  @keyframes blob-float {
   269→    0%,
   270→    100% {
   271→      transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1) rotate(0deg);
   272→    }
   273→    25% {
   274→      transform: translate(40px, -30px) scale(1.15) rotate(90deg);
   275→    }
   276→    50% {
   277→      transform: translate(-10px, 20px) scale(0.85) rotate(180deg);
   278→    }
   279→    75% {
   280→      transform: translate(-35px, -5px) scale(1.05) rotate(270deg);
   281→    }
   282→  }
   283→
   284→  .signature-animated path {
   285→    stroke-dasharray: 2400;
   286→    stroke-dashoffset: 2400;
   287→    fill: transparent;
   288→    animation: drawSignature 8s linear infinite both;
   289→    stroke-width: 2px;
   290→    stroke: var(--color-base-content);
   291→  }
   292→
   293→  @keyframes drawSignature {
   294→    0% {
   295→      stroke-dashoffset: 2400;
   296→    }
   297→
   298→    15% {
   299→      fill: transparent;
   300→    }
   301→
   302→    35%,
   303→    75% {
   304→      stroke-dashoffset: 0;
   305→      fill: var(--color-base-content);
   306→    }
   307→
   308→    90%,
   309→    100% {
   310→      stroke-dashoffset: 2400;
   311→      fill: transparent;
   312→    }
   313→  }
   314→
   315→  .animation-wave {
   316→    animation: wave 2s infinite;
   317→  }
   318→
   319→  .hover-shake:hover {
   320→    animation: shake 0.4s ease-in-out;
   321→  }
   322→
   323→  @keyframes shake {
   324→    0%,
   325→    100% {
   326→      transform: rotate(0deg);
   327→    }
   328→    25% {
   329→      transform: rotate(-5deg);
   330→    }
   331→    75% {
   332→      transform: rotate(5deg);
   333→    }
   334→  }
   335→
   336→  @keyframes wave {
   337→    0%,
   338→    100% {
   339→      transform: rotate(0deg);
   340→    }
   341→    50% {
   342→      transform: rotate(20deg);
   343→    }
   344→  }
   345→}
   346→
   347→@layer components {
   348→  .content-auto {
   349→    content-visibility: auto;
   350→  }
   351→
   352→  .shadow-out-sm {
   353→    box-shadow:
   354→      0 0 10px rgba(120, 120, 120, 0.1),
   355→      0 5px 20px rgba(120, 120, 120, 0.2);
   356→  }
   357→
   358→  .backface-hidden {
   359→    -webkit-backface-visibility: hidden;
   360→    -moz-backface-visibility: hidden;
   361→    -webkit-transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);
   362→    -moz-transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0);

   364→
   365→  .center {
   366→    align-items: center;
   367→    justify-content: center;
   368→  }
   369→
   370→  .fill-content {
   371→    min-height: calc(100vh - 17.5rem);
   372→  }
   373→
   374→  .card-shadow {
   375→    box-shadow:
   376→      0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08),
   377→      0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);
   378→  }
   379→
   380→  .card-shadow:hover {
   381→    box-shadow:
   382→      0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08),
   383→      0 6px 14px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
   384→  }
   385→}
   386→
   387→@layer components {
   388→  .shadow-perfect {
   389→    /* https://codepen.io/jh3y/pen/yLWgjpd */
   390→    --tint: 214;
   391→    --alpha: 3;
   392→    --base: hsl(var(--tint, 214) 80% 27% / calc(var(--alpha, 4) * 1%));
   393→    /**
   394→      * Use relative syntax to get to: hsl(221 25% 22% / 40%)
   395→    */
   396→    --shade: hsl(from var(--base) calc(h + 8) 25 calc(l - 5));
   397→    --perfect-shadow:
   398→      0 0 0 1px var(--base), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--shade),
   399→      0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--shade), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--shade),
   400→      0 12px 12px -6px var(--base), 0 24px 24px -12px var(--base);
   401→    box-shadow: var(--perfect-shadow);
   402→  }
   403→
   404→  .perfect-sm {
   405→    --alpha: 1;
   406→  }
   407→
   408→  .perfect-md {
   409→    --alpha: 2;
   410→  }
   411→
   412→  [theme='dark'] .shadow-perfect {
   413→    --tint: 221;
   414→  }
   415→}
   416→
   417→@layer components {
   418→  .mask-scroller {
   419→    mask:
   420→      linear-gradient(white, transparent) 50% 0 / 100% 0 no-repeat,
   421→      linear-gradient(white, white) 50% 50% / 100% 100% no-repeat,
   422→      linear-gradient(transparent, white) 50% 100% / 100% 30px no-repeat;
   423→    mask-composite: exclude;
   424→    mask-size:
   425→      100% calc((var(--scroll-progress-top) / 100) * 30px),
   426→      100% 100%,
   427→      100% calc((100 - (100 * (var(--scroll-progress-bottom) / 100))) * 1px);
   428→  }
   429→
   430→  @supports (animation-timeline: scroll()) {
   431→    .mask-scroller {
   432→      mask:
   433→        linear-gradient(white, transparent) 50% 0 / 100% 0 no-repeat,
   434→        linear-gradient(white, white) 50% 50% / 100% 100% no-repeat,
   435→        linear-gradient(transparent, white) 50% 100% / 100% 30px no-repeat;
   436→      mask-composite: exclude;
   437→      animation:
   438→        mask-up both linear,
   439→        mask-down both linear;
   440→      animation-timeline: scroll(self);
   441→      animation-range:
   442→        0 50px,
   443→        calc(100% - 50px) 100%;
   444→    }
   445→  }
   446→  @keyframes mask-up {
   447→    100% {
   448→      mask-size:
   449→        100% 30px,
   450→        100% 100%,
   451→        100% 30px;
   452→    }
   453→  }
   454→  @keyframes mask-down {
   455→    100% {
   456→      mask-size:
   457→        100% 30px,
   458→        100% 100%,
   459→        100% 0;
   460→    }
   461→  }
   462→}
   463→
   464→@layer components {
   465→  .shadow-context-menu {
   466→    box-shadow:
   467→      rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.067) 0px 3px 8px,
   468→      rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.067) 0px 2px 5px,
   469→      rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.067) 0px 1px 1px;
   470→  }
   471→}
   472→
   473→/* Tailwind 4 Extensions */
   474→@layer components {
   475→  .field-sizing-content {
   476→    field-sizing: content;
   477→  }
   478→}
   479→
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 16:27:47Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The highlighted CSS in the screenshot is:

```css
@layer base {
  :root, [data-theme] {
    background: var(--page-scroll-bg, var(--root-bg));
    color: var(--color-base-content);
  }
  :where(:root, [data-theme]) {
    --root-bg: var(--color-base-100);
  }
}
```

This is from DaisyUI. DaisyUI v5 (for Tailwind CSS v4) generates `@layer base` rules that set the background and color on `:root` and `[data-theme]` selectors. The `--color-base-100` and `--color-base-content` are DaisyUI theme variables.


Let me verify this against the DaisyUI source to make sure I'm reading it correctly.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 16:27:53Z)**_

此乃 **DaisyUI** 插件所生成。

截图中红框内之规则：

```css
@layer base {
  :root, [data-theme] {
    background: var(--page-scroll-bg, var(--root-bg));
    color: var(--color-base-content);
  }
  :where(:root, [data-theme]) {
    --root-bg: var(--color-base-100);
  }
}
```

其中 `--color-base-100` 与 `--color-base-content` 皆为 DaisyUI theme 变量，于 [tailwindcss.css:15-20](apps/web/src/styles/tailwindcss.css#L15-L20) 中声明：

```css
@plugin "daisyui" {
  themes: light --default, dark --prefersdark;
  logs: false;
}
```

DaisyUI 作为 TW4 plugin 加载后，自动注入 `@layer base` 规则，将 `--color-base-100` 设为 `background`，`--color-base-content` 设为 `color`。而 `--page-scroll-bg` 则为项目自定义覆盖，以 fallback 形式包裹 `--root-bg`。

若欲覆盖此行为，可于项目 CSS 中以更高优先级重写，或调整 DaisyUI theme 配置中的 `--color-base-100` / `--color-base-content` 值。

---

_**User (2026-02-25 16:28:47Z)**_

DaisyUI 为什么要给 [data-theme] 设定 bg

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 16:28:57Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user is asking why DaisyUI sets background on `[data-theme]` selector. This is a design decision by DaisyUI. Let me think about this.

DaisyUI uses `[data-theme]` attribute to support theme switching. When you have nested themes (e.g., a dark section inside a light page), the `[data-theme]` selector ensures that the background color changes accordingly for that section. Without setting `background` on `[data-theme]`, switching themes on a nested element would only change the CSS variables but not actually apply the background color visually.

This is a common pattern for theme systems - when you set `data-theme="dark"` on a `<div>`, you want that div to actually have the dark background, not just inherit variables.


The user might be running into issues with this approach, perhaps where their custom `--page-scroll-bg` override is conflicting with DaisyUI's background rules on the `[data-theme]` selector.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 16:29:01Z)**_

为支持**嵌套主题**（nested themes）。

DaisyUI 允许于任意元素上设 `data-theme` 以局部切换主题，例：

```html
<div data-theme="light">
  浅色区域
  <div data-theme="dark">
    此处为深色区域
  </div>
</div>
```

若仅于 `:root` 设 `background`，则内层 `[data-theme="dark"]` 虽切换了 CSS 变量，背景色却不会生效——因 `background` 未被重新声明。故 DaisyUI 于 `[data-theme]` 选择器上同设 `background`，使任何标注 `data-theme` 之元素皆自动应用对应主题背景。
